entities.name: SOIL CARBON STOCKS
entities.description: The amount of carbon stored in the soil across different layers and agro-ecologies

entities.name: CARBON HUMIFICATION
entities.description: The process of organic matter conversion into stable humus, assessed via LIFS

entities.name: CARBON RECALCITRANCE
entities.description: The resistance of soil carbon to decomposition and degradation

entities.name: SOIL TEXTURAL CLASS
entities.description: The classification of soil based on the relative proportions of sand, silt, and clay

entities.name: ALTITUDE
entities.description: The elevation of the sampling sites on the eastern foot slopes of Mount Kenya

entities.name: CLIMATIC PARAMETERS
entities.description: Environmental factors such as temperature and precipitation affecting soil carbon

entities.name: LAND USE
entities.description: The utilization of land, comparing agricultural systems and natural vegetation

entities.name: TEA
entities.description: A perennial crop used in the agricultural cropping systems sampled

entities.name: COFFEE
entities.description: A perennial crop used in the agricultural cropping systems sampled

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used in intercropping systems sampled

entities.name: TOTAL CARBON ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of determining the total amount of carbon in soil samples

entities.name: LASER-INDUCED FLUORESCENCE SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A spectroscopic method used to assess carbon humification and stability

entities.name: NEAR INFRARED SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A low-cost, reproducible spectroscopic method for quantitative analysis of soil carbon

entities.name: EMBU COUNTY
entities.description: The administrative region in Kenya where the soil assessment was conducted

entities.name: MOUNT KENYA
entities.description: The mountain whose eastern foot slopes served as the sampling area

entities.name: NAIROBI
entities.description: The capital city of Kenya used as a geographic reference point

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems of crop production including tea, coffee, and maize-based intercropping

entities.name: NATURAL VEGETATION
entities.description: Non-cultivated plant cover used as a baseline for soil carbon comparison

entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of soil carbon data to improve land and soil health practices
